## Screenshots / logs

<!--
If applicable, drag in a screenshot of the dialog/tray/palette.
For logs: %APPDATA%\Snippy\Logs\snippy.log (Windows) or ~/.local/state/Snippy/log/snippy.log (Linux/Mac)
Paste the relevant lines, or attach the whole file if it's small.
-->

## Environment

- **Snippy version:** (Tray menu ▸ About, or `python -m snippy --version`)
- **OS:** (Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 24.04 / etc.)
- **Python version:** (if running from source)
- **Install method:** (installer / portable .zip / `pip install -e .` / source)
- **Are you running with `--debug`?** (If yes, attach the log)

## Severity

<!-- Pick one and delete the rest -->

- [ ] Crash / data loss — can't use Snippy
- [ ] Major — feature broken
- [ ] Minor — feature works but ugly
- [ ] Cosmetic — text/icon/UX nit
